title: NaaP — Internal Debug

panels.title: BYOC Duplicate Rows

targets.rawSql: SELECT greatest(toInt64(count()) - toInt64(uniqExact(request_id)), 0) FROM naap.canonical_byoc_jobs WHERE $__timeFilter(completed_at) AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))

panels.description: Moved from naap-jobs.json by Phase 7 of serving-layer-v2. See docs/exec-plans/active/serving-layer-v2.md.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT event_ts AS "Time",
    event_type AS "Stage",
    coalesce(nullIf(JSONExtractString(data, 'pipeline'), ''), nullIf(JSONExtractString(data, 'pipeline_id'), ''), 'unknown') AS "Pipeline",
    gateway AS "Gateway",
    org AS "Org",
    JSONExtractString(data, 'stream_id') AS "Stream ID"
FROM naap.accepted_raw_events
WHERE event_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
ORDER BY "Time" DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Live Status/Trace/Capability Event Tape (30m)
panels.description: Moved from naap-live-operations.json by Phase 7 of serving-layer-v2. See docs/exec-plans/active/serving-layer-v2.md.

targets.rawSql:
WITH status_prompts AS (
    SELECT canonical_session_key,
        gateway,
        event_ts,
        raw_pipeline_hint,
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(data, 'inference_status', 'last_params', 'model_id'), '') AS model_id,
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(data, 'inference_status', 'last_params', 'prompt'), '') AS prompt_text,
        JSONExtractRaw(data, 'inference_status', 'last_params', 'prompt') AS prompt_raw
    FROM naap.normalized_ai_stream_status
    WHERE $__timeFilter(event_ts)
      AND canonical_session_key != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
), ranked AS (
    SELECT canonical_session_key,
        gateway,
        event_ts,
        prompt_text,
        prompt_raw,
        row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY canonical_session_key ORDER BY event_ts DESC) AS rn
    FROM status_prompts
    WHERE (
            lower(raw_pipeline_hint) LIKE '%streamdiffusion%'
         OR lower(raw_pipeline_hint) LIKE '%comfyui%'
         OR lower(raw_pipeline_hint) LIKE '%live-video%'
      )
      AND (
            '${model:csv}' = '__all'
         OR '${model:csv}' = ''
         OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))
         OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(raw_pipeline_hint, ''))
      )
      AND (
            prompt_text != ''
         OR (prompt_raw NOT IN ('', 'null', '{}', '[]'))
      )
), latest AS (
    SELECT event_ts,
        gateway,
        if(
            prompt_text != '',
            left(replaceRegexpAll(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM prompt_text), '\s+', ' '), 120),
            concat('[structured] ', substring(lower(hex(MD5(prompt_raw))), 1, 12))
        ) AS prompt_label
    FROM ranked
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT prompt_label AS "Prompt",
    count() AS "Sessions",
    countDistinct(gateway) AS "Gateways",
    max(event_ts) AS "Latest Seen"
FROM latest
GROUP BY prompt_label
ORDER BY "Sessions" DESC, "Latest Seen" DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Top Live Video Prompts (selected range)
panels.description:
Latest prompt seen per live-video session in the selected range. This panel reads normalized live-video status directly, matches the dashboard model filter against both live-video pipeline hints and embedded model ids, and groups structured prompts by hash when they are not plain strings.

Moved from naap-overview.json by Phase 7 of serving-layer-v2. See docs/exec-plans/active/serving-layer-v2.md.

panels.title: AI Batch Duplicate Rows

targets.rawSql: SELECT greatest(toInt64(count()) - toInt64(uniqExact(request_id)), 0) FROM naap.canonical_ai_batch_jobs WHERE $__timeFilter(completed_at) AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))

panels.description: Moved from naap-jobs.json by Phase 7 of serving-layer-v2. See docs/exec-plans/active/serving-layer-v2.md.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_ts, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time,
    event_type AS stage,
    count() AS events_per_minute
FROM naap.accepted_raw_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_ts)
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
GROUP BY time, stage
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Stage Throughput (selected range)
panels.description: Moved from naap-live-operations.json by Phase 7 of serving-layer-v2. See docs/exec-plans/active/serving-layer-v2.md.

panels.title: Canonical Coverage vs Source

targets.rawSql:
WITH source_counts AS (
  SELECT 'ai-batch' AS job_type, count() AS source_jobs
  FROM naap.normalized_ai_batch_job FINAL
  WHERE subtype = 'ai_batch_request_completed'
    AND request_id != ''
    AND $__timeFilter(event_ts)
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'byoc' AS job_type, count() AS source_jobs
  FROM naap.normalized_byoc_job FINAL
  WHERE subtype = 'job_gateway_completed'
    AND $__timeFilter(event_ts)
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
), canonical_counts AS (
  SELECT 'ai-batch' AS job_type, count() AS canonical_jobs
  FROM naap.canonical_ai_batch_jobs
  WHERE $__timeFilter(completed_at)
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'byoc' AS job_type, count() AS canonical_jobs
  FROM naap.canonical_byoc_jobs
  WHERE $__timeFilter(completed_at)
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
)
SELECT s.job_type, s.source_jobs, c.canonical_jobs,
  round(toFloat64(c.canonical_jobs) * 100.0 / nullIf(toFloat64(s.source_jobs), 0), 1) AS coverage_pct
FROM source_counts s
LEFT JOIN canonical_counts c ON s.job_type = c.job_type

panels.description: Moved from naap-jobs.json by Phase 7 of serving-layer-v2. See docs/exec-plans/active/serving-layer-v2.md.

panels.title: Payments by Capability

targets.rawSql:
SELECT capability, payment_type, count() AS payment_count,
    round(sum(amount), 4) AS total_amount,
    any(currency) AS currency,
    uniq(orch_address) AS unique_orchs
FROM naap.canonical_byoc_payments
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_ts) AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${capability:csv}' = '__all' OR '${capability:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${capability:csv}'), capability))
GROUP BY capability, payment_type ORDER BY total_amount DESC

panels.description: Moved from naap-jobs.json by Phase 7 of serving-layer-v2. See docs/exec-plans/active/serving-layer-v2.md.

list.name: org
list.label: Org
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.api_hourly_request_demand WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.api_hourly_request_demand WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org

list.name: capability
list.label: BYOC Capability
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT capability FROM (SELECT capability FROM naap.api_fact_byoc_job WHERE capability != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT capability_name AS capability FROM naap.api_observed_byoc_worker WHERE capability_name != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT capability_name AS capability FROM naap.api_hourly_byoc_auth WHERE capability_name != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT capability FROM naap.canonical_byoc_payments WHERE capability != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))) WHERE capability != '' ORDER BY capability
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT capability FROM (SELECT capability FROM naap.api_fact_byoc_job WHERE capability != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT capability_name AS capability FROM naap.api_observed_byoc_worker WHERE capability_name != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT capability_name AS capability FROM naap.api_hourly_byoc_auth WHERE capability_name != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) UNION ALL SELECT capability FROM naap.canonical_byoc_payments WHERE capability != '' AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))) WHERE capability != '' ORDER BY capability

description: Internal / resolver-facing debug panels that intentionally reach into canonical_*, normalized_*, or accepted_raw_events. NOT a serving contract — these queries exist to validate resolver correctness and inspect live pipeline traffic. Not provisioned to end users; this dashboard lives under infra/grafana/dashboards/internal/ so the grafana-lint API-contract check skips it.
